name: spotify
description: CLI to use Spotify from the terminal

subcommands.name: play
subcommands.description: Resume playback where Spotify last left off

subcommands.name: album
subcommands.description: Find an album by name and play it

args.name: album name
args.description: The album name you want to play

subcommands.name: artist
subcommands.description: Find an artist by name and play it

args.name: artist name
args.description: The artist name you want to play

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: Find a playlist by name and plays it

args.name: playlist name
args.description: The playlist name you want to play

subcommands.name: uri
subcommands.description: Play songs from specific uri

args.name: uri
args.description: The uri of the song you want to play

args.name: song name
args.description: The name of the song to start playing

subcommands.name: next
subcommands.description: Skip to the next song in a playlist

subcommands.name: prev
subcommands.description: Return to the previous song in a playlist

subcommands.name: replay
subcommands.description: Replay the current track from the beginning

subcommands.name: pos
subcommands.description: Jump to a time (in secs) in the current song

args.name: time
args.description: Exact time in secs to jump in

subcommands.name: pause
subcommands.description: Pause (or resume) Spotify playback

subcommands.name: stop
subcommands.description: Stop playback

subcommands.name: quit
subcommands.description: Stop playback and quit Spotify

subcommands.name: vol
subcommands.description: Show the current Spotify volume

args.name: amount
args.description: Set the volume to an amount between 0 and 100

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Show the current player status

subcommands.name: artist
subcommands.description: Show the currently playing artist

subcommands.name: album
subcommands.description: Show the currently playing album

subcommands.name: track
subcommands.description: Show the currently playing track

subcommands.name: share
subcommands.description: Display the current song's Spotify URL and URI

subcommands.name: url
subcommands.description: Display the current song's Spotify URL and copies it to the clipboard

subcommands.name: uri
subcommands.description: Display the current song's Spotify URI and copies it to the clipboard

subcommands.name: shuffle
subcommands.description: Toggle shuffle playback mode

subcommands.name: repeat
subcommands.description: Toggle repeat playback mode
